title: OSI vs TCP/IP Protocol Stack Comparison
description: A side-by-side visual comparison of the 7-layer OSI model and the 4-layer TCP/IP model, showing their functions and how they map to each other.
relationships: OSI Layers 5-7 map to TCP/IP Application Layer
OSI Layer 4 maps to TCP/IP Transport Layer
OSI Layer 3 maps to TCP/IP Internet Layer
OSI Layers 1-2 map to TCP/IP Network Access Layer
